content:
# Proppant Embedment

**Summary**: The physical sinking of proppant particles into the surrounding rock face.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-suleiman-5|Suleiman, 2024]] analyzed proppant-embedment to determine its impact on pack thickness and conductivity.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-suleiman-5|Suleiman, 2024]] Reduces effective pack thickness and flow area.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-suleiman-5|Suleiman, 2024]] Comparing conductivity between steel platens and sandstone slabs.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Embedment in sandstone led to a 77% lower conductivity compared to steel platens at high stress. ([[2024-suleiman-5|Suleiman, 2024, p. 80]])
